No Poverty.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to eradicating poverty.

Zero Hunger.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to ending hunger or improving nutrition.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: The course explicitly focuses on 'Health Fitness,' including assessment and training (aerobic, strength), directly supporting Target 3.4 by promoting physical activity for preventing non-communicable diseases.

Quality Education.reason: The course provides knowledge and practical skills for personal health and fitness planning, contributing to sustainable lifestyles as per Target 4.7.

Gender Equality.reason: The course is explicitly '男女合班' (male and female co-ed), ensuring equal access and participation in physical education for all genders, aligning with Target 5.1.
